task: I’ve got to send a short note to a subcontractor about a missed step on a job, and I want it to be clear enough that there’s no confusion about what needs to happen next. Can you help me word it so the message stays professional and gets the point across quickly?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — use this:

> **The step at [location] was missed. Stop work there and correct it before moving on. Confirm completion by [time/date]. If there’s any question, contact [name].**

If you want it a little firmer:

> **The step at [location] was missed. Do not proceed until it is corrected and confirmed by [time/date]. Questions go to [name].**

user_simulator.text: Yeah. That works. Short, clear, no extra fluff. I’d use the firmer one.
